one_line: Early Chola king of the Kaveri delta, famed builder of the Kallanai and patron of Tamil Sangam age.

appearance.age_look: Mid-30s, tall and athletic with a lean, sinewy build of a warrior accustomed to battle and hard campaigning.
appearance.face: Oval face with strong jawline, medium-brown Tamil complexion, straight prominent nose, thick brows slightly angled, a faint scar running from the right temple toward the cheek, and a calm, commanding default expression with steady, intense eyes.
appearance.hair: Thick black hair drawn into a high warrior-knot (kudumi) at the back of the crown, sides and back smoothed with oil, a narrow gold band circling the head just above the knot, and a small jasmine-string wrapped once around the base of the knot.
appearance.costume: Bare-chested upper body showing a simple sacred thread across the left shoulder, a finely woven off-white cotton angavastram with a deep maroon border draped over the left shoulder and falling behind, and a knee-length rich mustard-yellow silk vashti (dhoti) with a broad maroon border tied at the waist in a tight kacham style for riding and combat; around his waist a plain dark-brown leather war-belt holds a small cloth pouch, his forearms bear simple polished copper armlets, wrists have plain gold bangles, ankles have narrow bronze anklets, and his feet wear dark-brown leather sandals suitable for walking along river embankments and in camps.
appearance.signature: A long, slightly curved iron sword with a simple undecorated steel blade, a dark wooden hilt wrapped in brown leather, and a plain bronze disc pommel, carried in a brown leather scabbard hanging from his right hip.

ref_desc: Karikala Chola is a mid-30s tall, lean Tamil king with a medium-brown complexion, scar on his right temple, high black warrior-knot with a gold band and jasmine string, bare chest with off-white angavastram, mustard-yellow silk vashti with maroon borders, copper and gold ornaments, dark-brown sandals, and a plain curved iron sword in a brown leather scabbard at his right hip in a mustard, maroon, off-white, dark brown and gold palette.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style model sheet of Karikala Chola: a mid-30s tall, athletic Tamil king with medium-brown skin, oval face, strong jaw, prominent nose, thick angled brows, and a faint scar from his right temple to cheek, wearing a calm, commanding expression and steady intense eyes; his thick black hair is oiled and gathered into a high warrior-knot at the back of the crown, encircled by a narrow gold band with a small jasmine-string wrapped at the knot’s base; he is bare-chested except for a simple sacred thread over his left shoulder and a finely woven off-white cotton angavastram with deep maroon border draped over his left shoulder and hanging behind; he wears a knee-length rich mustard-yellow silk vashti (dhoti) with a broad maroon border, tied in a tight kacham style at the waist for mobility, held by a dark-brown leather war-belt with a small cloth pouch; his forearms bear simple polished copper armlets, wrists plain gold bangles, ankles narrow bronze anklets, and his feet dark-brown leather sandals; at his right hip hangs his signature weapon, a long slightly curved iron sword with simple steel blade, dark wooden hilt wrapped in brown leather, and plain bronze disc pommel, sheathed in a brown leather scabbard; show him from front, side, and back to capture the consistent mustard yellow, deep maroon, off-white, dark brown, and gold colour palette and all details of hair, face, costume, and sword.
